name: Bernie Sanders
subject: This is the truth
body:
#
Sisters and Brothers -
The truth of what's happening in this election is that the American people understand that you cannot change a corrupt political system by taking its money.
Another truth is this: if America wants a president who will truly do everything in his or her power to dismantle our corrupt system of campaign finance, **then we need a president who can get elected without the help of Wall Street, fossil fuel lobbyists, and the billionaire class.**
Our campaign doesn't owe anything to big banks, to campaign bundlers, or to lobbyists. The only people to whom I am beholden is our political revolution. Let's keep it that way.
[**Contribute $2.70 to our campaign to elect a president who isn't beholden to our corrupt system of campaign finance and show that we the people can elect our own president.**](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/most-important-three-weeks?refcode=em160408s3-full-nd "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/most-important-three-weeks?refcode=em160408s3-full-nd")
When I started this campaign, I had a choice: I could have a super PAC funded by millionaires and billionaires, or I could run for president without one. The political establishment dismissed us immediately. They thought it was impossible to win without money from the billionaire class.
They were wrong.
The bottom line is this: we've gotten this far with more than 6.6 million contributions from 2 million people, and we can win the White House that way too.
[**Help us show what's possible without billionaires and super PACs with a $2.70 contribution to our campaign right now.**](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/most-important-three-weeks?refcode=em160408s3-full-nd "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/most-important-three-weeks?refcode=em160408s3-full-nd")
They keep saying what we're doing is impossible. Let's keep proving them wrong.
In solidarity,
Bernie Sanders
**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/most-important-three-weeks?refcode=em160408s3-full-nd "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/most-important-three-weeks?refcode=em160408s3-full-nd")**

Paid for by Bernie 2016
PO Box 905 - Burlington VT 05402 United States - (855) 4-BERNIE
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you need to update or change your information or email address, click here to [update your info](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/change-your-information?source=email_footer "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/change-your-information?source=email_footer"). Email is one of the most important tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can let us know if you'd like to [receive fewer emails](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902 "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902"). We'd hate to see you go, but if you need to do so, click here to [unsubscribe](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/unsubscribe/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/unsubscribe/"). Stand against the powerful special interests who are systematically buying our Congress and have their sights set on the presidency by [contributing to Bernie here](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/lets-go-bernie?refcode=email_footer "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/lets-go-bernie?refcode=email_footer").

name: John Kasich
subject: 100 Days to go
body:
we're 100 days from the convention and just 10 days from the New
York Primary.

Peter, we're 100 days from the
convention and just 10 days from the New York Primary.

It's critical that we continue
gathering delegates in the upcoming states and not only deny
Trump the nomination but go into the convention with the wind at
our backs.

I know it's a lot to ask but I
could really use your support.

Will you do one of two things
right now?

1. Be a Team Kasich bundler for a
day - make a $25 contribution and forward this email to three
friends/family to ask them to join you? Help us hit our $100 for
100 Days goal!

2. Chip in with a $100
contribution to help us hit our critical fundraising goal by
Tuesday!

>> CHIP IN $25 <<

>> CHIP IN $50 <<

>> CHIP IN $100 <<

Nearly every national poll shows
that I'm the only Republican candidate who can defeat Hillary
Clinton in the fall and the latest New York & Maryland polls show
we're in a strong second place!
Help keep our momentum growing!

John Kasich
Governor of Ohio & Presidential
Candidate
JohnKasich.com

Paid for by Kasich
for America
www.JohnKasich.com

name: BREAKING@katiemcginty.com
subject: Sestak: “prostituted”
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Katie McGinty for Senate
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/-4712955317132984320/5777859936683819008?refcode=e20160409&refcode2=e20160409nd&amount=25)
---
**_Sestak_** : "Why win a seat, but you have to win it through a prostituted way?"
[**We have to answer this offensive comment. Chip in to elect Katie >>**](https://act.myngp.com/el/-4712955317132984320/5777859936683819008?refcode=e20160409&refcode2=e20160409nd&amount=25)

Friend, primary opponent Joe Sestak just said this about Katie's campaign for U.S. Senate:

_" Why win a seat, but you have to win it though a prostituted way?"
\-- Joe Sestak, at a PennLive Editorial Board meeting, 4/8/16_

First of all, **this language is sexist, offensive, and unbecoming of a Senate candidate.**

Second of all, what is he talking about? The thousands and thousands of supporters Katie has worked hard to gain over months of campaigning? Nurses, steelworkers, teachers, and firefighters who are backing her? The LGBT community and champions of the environment who are standing beside her? Katie receiving endorsements from President Obama and Vice President Joe Biden?

**We need to show Joe Sestak that his inflammatory statements are no match for Katie 's grassroots organization. [Pitch in now to support Katie and make sure she has the resources to close the gap and win on Primary Day.](https://act.myngp.com/el/-4712955317132984320/5777859936683819008?refcode=e20160409&refcode2=e20160409nd&amount=25)**

We're facing the greatest threat to women's health and rights in a generation. Donald Trump has called for "punishment" for women exercising their constitutionally protected right to choose. Ted Cruz and Pat Toomey have voted against the Violence Against Women Act and voted repeatedly for defunding Planned Parenthood. It's a sad day when we see that same kind of hateful rhetoric show up in our race to elect a Democratic candidate for Senate.

Language like this from politicians from either party only serves to amplify the challenges women face. It's a serious issue and it's simply unacceptable.

We deserve a champion for women's rights in Washington. Katie may be the underdog in this race, but she's working hard to win every vote -- by being the candidate Pennsylvania needs. And nothing Joe Sestak can say will change that.

[**Show Sestak who 's backing Katie -- YOU -- by pitching in to help her win her primary. Every dollar counts.**](https://act.myngp.com/el/-4712955317132984320/5777859936683819008?refcode=e20160409&refcode2=e20160409nd&amount=25)

Thanks,

Team Katie __ __
| [**DONATE**](https://act.myngp.com/el/-4712955317132984320/5777859936683819008?refcode=e20160409&refcode2=e20160409nd&amount=25)
---
| | Paid For By Katie McGinty for Senate
---
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
If you no longer wish to receive updates from our campaign, please [unsubscribe](https://act.myngp.com/el/-4712955317132984320/5705802342645891072).

Katie McGinty for Senate
PO Box 22447
Philadelphia PA 19110 United States

name: Joe Sestak
subject: Cup of Joe: April 9, 2016
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Joe Sestak
body:
www.JoeSestak.com
CUP OF JOE

April 9th, 2016
Newsletter

Good morning! I wanted to provide an update about what I've been up to and where I've traveled. Thanks so much for reading, I truly appreciate your support!

National Security Debate in Erie

The most important vote a Senator can take is the decision to go to war. That's why I was honored to participate in the candidates debate on national security in Erie on Thursday. Too few understand that militaries can stop a problem, but they cannot fix a problem - and as a result, the tragic misadventure in Iraq has cost our American Dream $3 trillion in direct and enduring costs. Watch the debate in its entirety at the link below!

https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=tJGdWAYxPss

Independent Fact Checkers Find My Opponent's Attacks FALSE

At a separate debate in Pittsburgh, one of my opponents made a series of false claims about my proven record of defending and expanding Social Security, as well as my long-held and consistent position in favor of a moratorium on Marcellus shale fracking.

Independent fact checkers from the TV station that held the debate quickly determined that my opponent's attacks were not accurate. It is unfortunate that politicians have to resort to distortion just to try and win an election. To watch what Pittsburgh's WTAE Action News found, go to the link below!

https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=-yitBzlHtjE

An Editorial Board Meeting with the Reading Eagle

I stopped by the Reading Eagle on Friday to talk about why I am running for the U.S. Senate: because I want to bring integrity of service, where I'm in it for people above party or type. You can watch a clip from the meeting by going to the first link below, or you can click the link below it to read their write-up!

https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=IiDUJZblWyA

http://www.readingeagle.com/news/article/joe-sestak-talks-with-the-reading-eagle&template=mobileart

Spending Time with You

Between the debates and the editorial boards, I most enjoy the time I spend across the Commonwealth with all of you. This campaign is about earning the trust of the people, because it is you who I want to continue to serve. See you on the campaign trail, and thank you for all that you do!

Thanks for reading -- and please click the "contribute" button to keep our momentum going!

Joe

https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/admiraljoesestak-web?refcode=16EM0409CJFacebook: www.facebook.com/joesestak
Twitter: twitter.com/JoeSestak
www.joesestak.com

Friends of Joe Sestak
P.O. Box 1936
Media, PA 19063

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com | http://action.joesestak.com/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com

Paid for by Friends of Joe Sestak

name: Team Murphy
subject: SHAME ON YOU, RICK SCOTT
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Patrick Murphy | 4521 PGA Blvd #412, Palm Beach Gardens, FL 33418 | [http://murphyforflorida
body:
| [](http://fl.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2330/738133e4/35d059ff/7f823d44/147405025/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/pme160410?refcode=pme160410_a_other&refcode2=516470")
---
Friends,

Last week Governor Rick Scott walked into a coffee shop in Gainesville, Florida. He probably thought he'd walk in, get a drink, maybe shake some hands, and walk out again.

Yeah. That's not how it went.

**A woman at the coffee shop scolded Scott over his disastrous policies, including defunding Planned Parenthood and cutting Medicaid.** "Shame on you, Rick Scott" she said. "You're an embarrassment to our state."

We agree. [_**If you do, click here and tell Rick Scott: SHAME ON YOU!**_](http://fl.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2330/738133e4/35d059ff/7f823d45/147405025/VEsE/ "http://fl.murphyforflorida.com/e160409am")

Perhaps shouting at a coffee shop isn't the most effective tactic. But it showcases the sheer frustration people are feeling with Republican leadership in Florida.

This woman said she couldn't get insurance because of Scott's cuts to Medicaid. There are thousands of Floridians with that same story. Planned Parenthood serves 67,000 women in Florida each year -- women who may lose access to cancer screenings, birth control, or reproductive care because Rick Scott denied them state funding.

[_**Tell Rick Scott: SHAME ON YOU for denying women access to vital care >>**_](http://fl.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2330/738133e4/35d059ff/7f823d45/147405025/VEsF/ "http://fl.murphyforflorida.com/e160409am")

Thanks!

Team Murphy

| | | | Paid for by Friends of Patrick Murphy | 4521 PGA Blvd #412, Palm Beach Gardens, FL 33418 | [http://murphyforflorida.com](http://fl.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2330/738133e4/35d059ff/7f823d46/147405025/VEsC/ "http://murphyforflorida.com/")
---
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. [Click here to unsubscribe](http://fl.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2330/738133e4/35d059ff/7f823d47/147405025/VEsD/ "http://murphyforflorida.com/unsubscribe").

Contributions or gifts to Friends of Patrick Murphy are not tax deductible.

All content (C) 2016 Friends of Patrick Murphy, All Rights Reserved
[Privacy Policy](http://fl.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2330/738133e4/35d059ff/7f823d40/147405025/VEsA/ "http://murphyforflorida.com/privacy")

name: Beth Hansen, Campaign Manager
subject: RE: 100 Days to go
body:
Peter,just making sure you saw Gov. Kasich's email. 100 days to
go! Thank you

Peter, just making sure you saw
Gov. Kasich's email. 100 days to go!

Thank you

-Beth

Sent from my iPad

--

From: John Kasich
To: Beth Hansen
Date: April 9, 2016
Subject: 100 Days to go

Beth, we're 100 days from the
convention and just 10 days from the New York Primary.

It's critical that we continue
gathering delegates in the upcoming states and not only deny
Trump the nomination but go into the convention with the wind at
our backs.

I know it's a lot to ask but I
could really use your support.

Will you do one of two things
right now?

1. Be a Team Kasich bundler for a
day - make a $25 contribution and forward this email to three
friends/family to ask them to join you? Help us hit our $100 for
100 Days goal!

2. Chip in with a $100
contribution to help us hit our critical fundraising goal by
Tuesday!

>> CHIP IN $25 <<

>> CHIP IN $50 <<

>> CHIP IN $100 <<

Nearly every national poll shows
that I'm the only Republican candidate who can defeat Hillary
Clinton in the fall and the latest New York & Maryland polls show
we're in a strong second place!
Help keep our momentum growing!

John Kasich
Governor of Ohio & Presidential
Candidate
JohnKasich.com

Paid for by Kasich
for America

name: Joe Sestak
subject: Dinner and a debate?
body:
[](http://action.joesestak.com/page/m/1719acb/3476a20e/d8c601c/2745d4f5/1268874451/VEsH/ "http://joesestak.com")
---

Peter, Tonight, I will be returning to Penn State (where I taught for a year as a law school professor) to participate in one of the last few debates of this primary election. The debate will begin at 8 p.m., and I was hoping that you might watch it after your Saturday night dinner. Penn State's public broadcasting channel has informed us that they will be streaming it live online, at the link below: [http://wpsu.psu.edu/live/](http://action.joesestak.com/page/m/1719acb/3476a20e/d8c601c/2745d4f4/1268874451/VEsE/ "http://wpsu.psu.edu/live/") It's free to watch, [but I was hoping that you might symbolically purchase a ticket, for $3, $5, $7, or $10 so that I can better continue the debate of ideas after the evening is over.](http://action.joesestak.com/page/m/1719acb/3476a20e/d8c601c/2745d4f3/1268874451/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/gotyour6?refcode=16EM0409FB1p1&amounts=3,5,7,10,20,50,100") | [](http://action.joesestak.com/page/m/1719acb/3476a20e/d8c601c/2745d4f2/1268874451/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/gotyour6?refcode=16EM0409FB1b1&amounts=3,5,7,10,20,50,100")
---
Warmly,
Joe

| [](http://action.joesestak.com/page/m/1719acb/3476a20e/d8c601c/2745d4f1/1268874451/VEsD/ "https://www.facebook.com/joesestak")[
](http://action.joesestak.com/page/m/1719acb/3476a20e/d8c601c/2745d4f0/1268874451/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/admiraljoesestak-web?refcode=Footer")
[](http://action.joesestak.com/page/m/1719acb/3476a20e/d8c601c/2745d4ff/1268874451/VEsB/ "http://joesestak.com/") |
---|---|---

P.O. Box 1936
Media, PA 19063

name: BernieSanders.com
subject: Ever since we won Wisconsin
body:
#
Here's the truth: **ever since we won Wisconsin, the Clinton campaign has gone HARD NEGATIVE against Bernie** as part of the plan to "disqualify him, defeat him" and unify the party later.
Why? Because we're winning primaries and caucuses by dramatic margins, and those victories have opened up a clear path to the nomination. And we have a chance to do very well in Wyoming later this afternoon.
They didn't expect that, so they're throwing the kitchen sink at us. Her campaign has scheduled and held FIFTEEN fundraisers in the first 7 days of April, and they're spending big in New York, a state she led by 48 points four weeks ago. The head of her coordinated super PAC compared Bernie to Donald Trump, and one of Clinton's top surrogates in New York called Bernie a "socialist" with a "quest for power" who is not qualified to be commander-in-chief.
**But that 's ok - the Clinton campaign's attacks only remind people of the kind of politics the American people are rejecting through our campaign.** If we keep fighting, we're going to keep winning, no matter how negative they get.
[**Make a $2.70 contribution to Bernie 's campaign today. This is THE MOST IMPORTANT three weeks of this campaign. So donate today and know that you've done everything you can to win this campaign.**](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/these-next-3-weeks?refcode=em160409-nd "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/these-next-3-weeks?refcode=em160409-nd")
We have two choices in these next three weeks. We can either continue to fight for the values we share: universal health care, reducing income inequality, protecting our environment, and transforming our corrupt campaign finance system. Or we will come up short.
Bernie is traveling the country and speaking at huge rallies. Our field offices are humming in every state with a coming caucus or primary.
The rest is up to you. If we have the resources to win, we will. [**That 's why your $2.70 matters so much. It's the difference between victory and defeat.**](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/these-next-3-weeks?refcode=em160409-nd "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/these-next-3-weeks?refcode=em160409-nd")
Thank you for renewing your commitment to our campaign today.
In solidarity,
Jeff Weaver
Campaign Manager
Bernie 2016
**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/these-next-3-weeks?refcode=em160409-nd "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/these-next-3-weeks?refcode=em160409-nd")**

Paid for by Bernie 2016
PO Box 905 - Burlington VT 05402 United States - (855) 4-BERNIE
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you need to update or change your information or email address, click here to [update your info](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/change-your-information?source=email_footer "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/change-your-information?source=email_footer"). Email is one of the most important tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can let us know if you'd like to [receive fewer emails](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902 "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902"). We'd hate to see you go, but if you need to do so, click here to [unsubscribe](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/unsubscribe/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/unsubscribe/"). Stand against the powerful special interests who are systematically buying our Congress and have their sights set on the presidency by [contributing to Bernie here](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/lets-go-bernie?refcode=email_footer "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/lets-go-bernie?refcode=email_footer").

name: HillaryClinton.com
subject: Help Hillary win this primary:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hillary for America, a campaign supported by more than one million grassroots donors
body:
There's something fishy going on... | Friend --

Bernie's campaign has a new strategy -- in states they didn’t win like Nevada and Florida, they’re flooding local conventions with volunteers to try to “steal” delegates for Bernie, overturning the will of the voters.

“Steal” isn’t my word. It’s what one of Bernie’s former top staffers said: “Volunteers mobilized to get tons of people to show up to the state convention and **_actually steal the day for Bernie.”_**

If they can’t win contests outright, they’ve decided to try and sway superdelegates and even pledged delegates to their side -- and in some states, it’s working. That means we need to bring home even BIGGER wins in New York, Pennsylvania, and more to make sure voters’ voices get heard and Hillary wins this nomination.

**That starts with you. Will you chip in right now to help lock down this nomination once and for all? As a token of our appreciation, we’ll send you a free sticker when you do:** [ | | [**Donate $1**](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=5&ms=MjUxOTYyMjUS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzgxNDU0NzE0S0&mt=1&rt=0)
--- ](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=5&ms=MjUxOTYyMjUS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzgxNDU0NzE0S0&mt=1&rt=0)
Thanks -- I’m so proud of our team, and I’m so glad you’re a part of it.

Robby

Robby Mook
Campaign Manager
Hillary for America

**Hillary needs you now more than ever -- chip in $1 to join more than one million grassroots donors standing with her:**

| [ | [**Donate $1**](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=14&ms=MjUxOTYyMjUS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzgxNDU0NzE0S0&mt=1&rt=0)
--- ](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=14&ms=MjUxOTYyMjUS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzgxNDU0NzE0S0&mt=1&rt=0)

| Paid for by Hillary for America, a campaign supported by more than one million grassroots donors.
---
Contributions or gifts to Hillary for America are not tax deductible.
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. This is your campaign, so if you have thoughts on anything at all, just [click here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=8&ms=MjUxOTYyMjUS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzgxNDU0NzE0S0&mt=1&rt=0) to send us a message! If you'd like more information on key policies, visit [hillaryclinton.com/issues](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=11&ms=MjUxOTYyMjUS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzgxNDU0NzE0S0&mt=1&rt=0). Getting emails from Hillary for America is one of the best ways to stay in touch with this campaign, but if you really want to scale back, click [here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=12&ms=MjUxOTYyMjUS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzgxNDU0NzE0S0&mt=1&rt=0) to receive less email and click [here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=1&ms=MjUxOTYyMjUS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzgxNDU0NzE0S0&mt=1&rt=0) to unsubscribe. There are other ways to stay involved -- be sure to follow the campaign on [Facebook](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=MjUxOTYyMjUS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzgxNDU0NzE0S0&mt=1&rt=0), [Twitter](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=3&ms=MjUxOTYyMjUS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzgxNDU0NzE0S0&mt=1&rt=0), and [Instagram](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=6&ms=MjUxOTYyMjUS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzgxNDU0NzE0S0&mt=1&rt=0). Puedes encontrar más información sobre la campaña de Hillary en español [aquí](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=13&ms=MjUxOTYyMjUS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzgxNDU0NzE0S0&mt=1&rt=0). If you're still reading this, you must be a really dedicated Hillary supporter. [Yee-haw for you](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=9&ms=MjUxOTYyMjUS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzgxNDU0NzE0S0&mt=1&rt=0)! Thanks so much for doing everything you can to elect Hillary Clinton as our next president.
Hillary for America, P.O. Box 5256, New York, NY 10185
[Privacy Policy](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=4&ms=MjUxOTYyMjUS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzgxNDU0NzE0S0&mt=1&rt=0)

name: Bernie Sanders
subject: We just won Wyoming!
body:
#
Sisters and Brothers -
We just got word that we won Wyoming's caucus. **This is huge.**
This momentum is just what we need in order to win New York's crucial primary in 10 days. But we also must know that the billionaire class is more scared than ever, and **they don't want to see us win again. They want to stop us here and now.**
[**Contribute $2.70 to our campaign and we can keep our momentum going with another huge victory in New York. Your investment today in our movement will go a long way to taking back our country from the billionaire class.**](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/wyoming-win?refcode=em160409full-nd "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/wyoming-win?refcode=em160409full-nd")
Momentum is winning eight out of the last nine contests while bringing more and more voters and young people to our side as we talk about income inequality, climate change, universal health care, and our corrupt campaign finance system.
Momentum is proving again and again to the political and economic establishment that you don't need to have a super PAC in order to win the presidency.
This momentum is incredible - but you'll never imagine what our momentum can be if we win New York's primary.
[**Contribute $2.70 to our campaign and we can win New York's primary, win the Democratic nomination, win the White House, and take back our country from the billionaire class.**](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/wyoming-win?refcode=em160409full-nd "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/wyoming-win?refcode=em160409full-nd")
Thanks for being with us.
In solidarity,
Bernie Sanders
**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/wyoming-win?refcode=em160409full-nd "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/wyoming-win?refcode=em160409full-nd")**

Paid for by Bernie 2016
PO Box 905 - Burlington VT 05402 United States - (855) 4-BERNIE
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you need to update or change your information or email address, click here to [update your info](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/change-your-information?source=email_footer "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/change-your-information?source=email_footer"). Email is one of the most important tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can let us know if you'd like to [receive fewer emails](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902 "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902"). We'd hate to see you go, but if you need to do so, click here to [unsubscribe](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/unsubscribe/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/unsubscribe/"). Stand against the powerful special interests who are systematically buying our Congress and have their sights set on the presidency by [contributing to Bernie here](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/lets-go-bernie?refcode=email_footer "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/lets-go-bernie?refcode=email_footer").
